title: Vileda SuperMocio 3Action XL Mop with Extra Refill, Red/Grey/Blue, 15 x 6 x 117 cm
features: • Vileda Supermocio 3Action XL Mop with spare mop head
• The mop includes 3 main cleaning actions: red non-scratch scourer for stubborn dirt, blue microfiber strips for removing greasy residue, 3D red dots for extra hair and particle pick up
• Now XL for 25% extra floor contact, making cleaning more efficient.
• Telescopic handle extends from 80 - 140cm for a height that suits you.
• For faster drying floors use with the Vileda SuperMocio Bucket with Torsion Wringer (available to purchase separately).
description: From the manufacturer Three cleaning actions for effective cleaning Lightweight Mop head easily washable Suitable for all sealed hard floors Vileda SuperMocio 3 Action XL Mop with Extra Refill The SuperMocio 3Action XL mop now has 25% extra contact with the floor vs the previous supermocio for improved cleaning performance. This mop features three main cleaning actions for effectively removing stubborn dirt, cleaning greasy marks and for hair and particle pick-up. It also includes super-absorbent strands and a special shaped head to make corner cleaning easier. Suitable for both tiled and vinyl flooring. 3Action 1- Red non-scratch scourer for tough dirt removal. 2- Microfibre zone for greasy dirt removal. 3- 3D red flocked material for extra hair and particle pick-up. 25% extra contact with the floor for improved cleaning. With a detachable head which is machine washable at up to 60 degrees. Replacement head included. Designed to work best with the new and improved SuperMocio Bucket with torsion wringer, which requires less effort and results in faster drying floors (bucket with wringer sold separately).
